scope: Repository-health governance source and deterministic coordinator only.

main.definition: Accepted and fully validated source baseline that is safe for downstream contracts.

dev.definition: Optional named integration branch for tested, coherent work not yet eligible for main.

feature_branches.dev_target_condition: Only when the named integration train requires dev.

proof_model.exact_head: The literal reviewed PR-head SHA; never a synthetic merge result.
proof_model.exact_main: A fresh post-merge audit whose audited SHA equals the accepted main SHA.

ci_claim_rules.hosted_CI_green: Claim only when the named hosted CI run passed for the exact claimed SHA.
ci_claim_rules.local_gate: Claim as local proof only; it is not hosted CI or production proof.
ci_claim_rules.no_configured_CI: State NOT_CONFIGURED rather than inferring green status.
ci_claim_rules.production: Never infer deployment from main, a PR merge, or CI alone.

admission.APPROVED_PRESERVED_EVIDENCE: Non-blocking only with a verified preservation ledger and verified access boundary.
admission.UNKNOWN_DIRT: Blocking unclassified dirt; it cannot be relabeled as approved evidence without evidence and review.
admission.SNAPSHOT_REQUIRED: Required whenever a reviewer must not access original worktree evidence; the reviewer receives only a tracked snapshot bound to the exact source SHA and deterministic tree digest.
